stemHtml: The operator instructs the Pilot to carry 5000 kg of additional fuel due to a refueling issue at the destination airport. How much of this fuel is actually available for the return flight?

options.a: More than 5000 kg because you have contingency fuel onboard.
options.b: Less than 5000 kg due to increased consumption from the added weight.
options.d: All 5000 kg will be used before arrival at the destination.
